title: Rei II and the Wunder
wikitext:
[]: Rei-II and the Wunder             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Aug 17, 2014 2:28 pm I'd like to start a series of threads examining smaller scale topics and details in Eva 3.0, in the hope that considering specific issue might help us zone in on other questions or stumble across new interpretations. To start, I want to discuss a possible connection between the appearance of Rei-II and the presence of the Wunder around Nerv HQ in the final third of the film. After Shinji sees the destruction of the world outside, we have the scene where Rei-Q wakes in her tank and sees Rei-II standing outside the tank. A wild Rei-II appears  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by airman4 » Sun Aug 17, 2014 3:05 pm Clever observation I didnt noticed that some movement make total sense now. we can maybe make those kind of observation for the Rei III telepathic , how she found Shinji and reach him etc

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 17, 2014 4:34 pm ^ Somebody (maybe Ornette?) mentioned it could have been Rei II in Eva-01. We just don't know where the source of the voice was yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Aug 17, 2014 6:55 pm We have no guarantee that the apprition was, in fact, Rei II, or from inside unit one. Remember the nigh-identical bookend Rei from 1.11 - Wouldn't it make more sense to find one explanation for two instances of one phenomenon, instead of a separate explanation for each of those very similar manifestations? Both Reis are likely from the same event, (presumably, but not necessarily final impact), but whatever caused it, if Rei can be back in 2015, the Wunder's proximity is obviously not a factor. Now who did we see? a) Interim Rei - As in, whatever gave Lillith a Rei face. b) ReiQ, who was involved in final Impact c) Rei II, who was involved in final impact through unit one d) Unclear Ressurected Lillith being, resulting from ReiQ merging with unit one all possibly comming to guide poor ReiQ or possibly their "younger self" into creating them ("bad wolf" style). Some involvement of ReiII seems likely because the others wouldn't wear that school uniform - ReiQ never seems to have worn that uniform that is draped outside her room - She seems to go naked whenever she isn't in her plugsuit.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Aug 17, 2014 7:48 pm ^ One thing to note is that we’ve never seen a Rei apparition appear before an actual Rei before. The entire event not only looked odd, but felt odd. Why would Rei need to quietly observe herself? What she there for that event already, therefore doesn’t need to look back upon it? Why would Rei Q be surprised by being looked upon by her Quantum Rei self? Wouldn’t she have known that she would do such a thing later on? I would like to keep in mind that none of the explanations and theories derived from NGE are guaranteed to be put into use or make sense for NTE. I mean, look at how it’s revealed that Yui is Eva 01’s control system in Q , rather than just being the soul in Unit 01’s core. The explanation is lightly different from NGE, therefore it wasn't entirely what we expected in NTE. Maybe the explanation to other things are different as well, and are not to be associated with NGE’s world building. So basically, Quantum Rei theories applied in NTE are unfounded until proven otherwise by the series itself. We must start from scratch. As a result, whereas the Rei apparition in Jo and the Rei apparition in Q might still be connected, they don’t have to come from whatever form Rei may or may not take on in FINAL in order to occur. (Seeing as how FINAL hasn't come out yet, we have no basis to assume anything of that film just yet.) It could be that somehow Rei II can just project her avatar in different places, allowing herself to quietly observe things. (This might have been an effect on her body after begin absorbed into both the Angel and Unit 01 at the end of Ha.) Until something is confirmed or denied in FINAL, we really have to clue as to what else might cause these apparitions in NTE outside of that which this new series has already shown us. And so far, it has only been shown us apparitions of Rei that look like Rei II, and befuddle Rei Q. Our only link to the apparitions is the image that Rei II takes. (The school uniform becoming is indicative of Rei II, whereas the plug suit or all natural is our visual accusation with Rei Q.) So far we don’t have any NTE material that suggest anything else. With all that being said, OMF’s theory of the Rei apparition in Q is the most valid one thus far in NTE (given this slight alteration), because it only assumes the information that the series itself has given us thus far. It could be that the apparition in Jo was Rei II’s doing, possibly even resulting from whatever effect being absorbed into an Angel in the end of Ha had on her body. If Rei is absorbed yet again in FINAL, but instead into Lilith, this might cause a second source for Rei apparitions. this means that, if such an event occurs in FINAL, that there might be two separate sources of apparitions in NTE. Either that, or it could negate any idea that being absorbed into the Angel at the end of Ha had this effect in Rei II’s body. But since a scene like that hasn’t occurred yet, we have no real basis to form either theories. We only have the answers Q gives us. (Which, now that I’ve typed that last sentence, really makes me realize how little we really know. I mean, really. “Answers Q gives us...” HA !)

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Aug 17, 2014 8:29 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: ^ One thing to note is that we’ve never seen a Rei apparition appear before an actual Rei before. The entire event not only looked odd, but felt odd. Why would Rei need to quietly observe herself? What she there for that event already, therefore doesn’t need to look back upon it? Why would Rei Q be surprised by being looked upon by her Quantum Rei self? Wouldn’t she have known that she would do such a thing later on?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 17, 2014 8:34 pm @Freaky: How can any of the Reis be absorbed into Lilith when Lilith's body and head exploded during Near Fourth Impact?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Aug 17, 2014 8:38 pm Regarding Rei 2 looking at Rei Q - didn't Kaworu tell Shinji that Rei Q was unsuitable because "her soul was somewhere else"? It's possible that the Ayanami series are fully sentient without being in possession of a soul, and that the quantum Rei 2 that we see is a manifestation of the only soul that there is. Not that it makes much sense, but the new soul mechanics have not been explained yet.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Aug 17, 2014 8:52 pm Kendrix wrote: Quantum!Rei's expression is pretty neutral and doesn't change. She's NOT surprised in any way. The one looking up surprisedly, as indicated by the orange filter/water effects on the hair/crossed bangs, is ReiQ.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Aug 17, 2014 9:20 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Um, yeah. That’s just what I said.

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Sun Aug 17, 2014 9:21 pm Kendrix wrote: But you don't have to look back to NGE to conclude that those quantum Rei phenomena are most likely to have a similar source. And, again, if she can be in 2015, any argument about her presence in Neo-Nerv being caused by the Wunder's physical proximity, as the OP was stating, goes up in flames, no reference to NGE needed. Even if she were in the Wunder, physical or temporal proximity would not be a factor.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Aug 17, 2014 10:06 pm Kendrix wrote: But you don't have to look back to NGE to conclude that those quantum Rei phenomena are most likely to have a similar source.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Aug 18, 2014 6:37 pm Kendrix wrote: Both Reis are likely from the same event, (presumably, but not necessarily final impact), but whatever caused it, if Rei can be back in 2015, the Wunder's proximity is obviously not a factor.
